chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5839 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "إِنَّكُمْ لَنْ تَسَعُوا اَلنَّاسَ بِأَمْوَالِكُمْ فَسَعُوهُمْ بِأَخْلاَقِكُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5839 - Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Indeed, you cannot encompass people with your wealth, so encompass them with your good character."
